app.title: Asset Splitter
app.subtitle: Extract and process game assets for modding

descriptions.gameDirectory: Select the Anno game root folder
descriptions.firstRunHint: Choose your game folder (Auto-Detect or Browse), set an output folder, then click Extract Game Files. Processing options unlock after raw game files are extracted.

checkboxes.commentsDesc: Add translated names as XML comments beside GUID values.
checkboxes.dependenciesDesc: Merge BaseAssetGUID parent data into each extracted asset.
checkboxes.templatesDesc: Group asset XML files into folders named after their template.
checkboxes.modOpsWrapDesc: Wrap output as Mod Loader-compatible ModOps/ModOp XML instead of raw Asset XML.
checkboxes.noDefaultPropertiesDesc: Do not fill in missing properties from properties.xml when merging templates
checkboxes.includeDefaultPropertiesDesc: Fill missing fields from properties.xml while merging template data.
checkboxes.splitTemplatesDesc: Export templates.xml as separate files per template in the output_templates folder.
checkboxes.createAssetModsDesc: Build ready-to-copy Mod Loader folders for each extracted asset XML.
checkboxes.createAssetModsHint: (wraps ModOps when writing each mod folder)
checkboxes.debugModeDesc: Show detailed troubleshooting output in the console log.

developerTools.title: Developer tools
developerTools.copyReportTip: Copy paths, options, backend command, diagnostics, and all console lines.
developerTools.openAnnoAssetsTip: Open the resolved AnnoAssets output folder.

tooltips.theme: Choose between Light, Dark, or follow your system setting.
tooltips.annoPath: Root folder of your Anno installation — must contain a 'maindata' folder with .rda archive files.
tooltips.outputPath: Where extracted assets and mod folders are saved. An 'AnnoAssets' subfolder is created here automatically.
tooltips.extract: Step 3 on first run: extract raw game files from RDA archives. Later: process assets with the options on the left.
tooltips.processingOptionsWhenLocked:
Locked until game files are extracted.

Set game and output paths, then click Extract. These options unlock once source_xml files are detected on disk.
tooltips.processingOptionsWhenReady: Configure how extracted assets are processed, then click Process Assets.
tooltips.cancel: Kills the running extraction process immediately. Already-processed files are kept.
tooltips.browse: Open the system folder picker to navigate to a directory.
tooltips.autoDetect: Scan your computer for Anno 1800 and Anno 117 installations via Ubisoft Connect registry, Steam registry and library folders, Epic Games manifests, and common paths.
tooltips.developerUnlock: Tap the logo 7 times to reveal developer tools — verbose debug console, copy diagnostic report, open extracted files.
tooltips.uiLanguage: Changes the language of all UI labels, buttons, tooltips, and messages. Independent of the game language setting.
tooltips.singleGuid:
Most runs leave this blank — that extracts every asset from the game.

To export one item only, enter its numeric GUID (example: 1010017). A preview line appears below when the ID is found in assets.xml.

Single-asset mode disables template folders and split templates. Resolve parents can still merge parent data.
tooltips.languageWhenOff:
Game language is locked.

Turn on GUID comments to choose a texts_*.xml file. Every other option works without a game language.
tooltips.languageWhenOn:
Pick a texts_*.xml file for translated GUID comments.

If the list is empty, run extraction first.
tooltips.commentsWhenOff:
Disabled — no translated name comments in the XML.

The game language dropdown stays locked.
tooltips.commentsWhenOn:
Enabled — adds translated names beside each GUID.

Also unlocks the game language dropdown above.
tooltips.dependenciesWhenOff: Disabled — parent BaseAssetGUID data is not merged into child assets.
tooltips.dependenciesWhenOn: Enabled — merges inherited BaseAssetGUID chains into each asset.
tooltips.includeDefaultPropertiesWhenOff: Disabled — missing template fields are not filled from properties.xml.
tooltips.includeDefaultPropertiesWhenOn: Enabled — fills missing template fields from properties.xml defaults.
tooltips.modOpsWrapWhenOff: Disabled — output stays as raw <Asset> XML.
tooltips.modOpsWrapWhenOn: Enabled — wraps output in Mod Loader ModOps/ModOp XML.
tooltips.templatesWhenOff: Disabled — all asset files stay in one folder.
tooltips.templatesWhenOn: Enabled — groups files into subfolders by template name.
tooltips.splitTemplatesWhenOff: Disabled — templates.xml is not exported as separate files.
tooltips.splitTemplatesWhenOn: Enabled — writes one XML file per template to output_templates.
tooltips.createAssetModsWhenOff: Disabled — no per-asset Mod Loader folders are created.
tooltips.createAssetModsWhenOn:
Enabled — builds one ready-to-copy Mod Loader folder per asset.

Optional: turn on Template folders to group mods by template name; otherwise folders are named by GUID and asset name.
tooltips.debugModeWhenOn: Enabled — verbose log with backend args and per-file details.
tooltips.status: Shows the current extraction phase, real-time progress percentage, and completion status. Updates live while the backend runs.
tooltips.log: Color-coded real-time console log with every extraction step. Right-click to copy selected lines or the full log. Scrolls automatically to newest entries.

dialogs.multipleGamesMsg:
Found {0} Anno games installed.

Please select which game to extract assets from.
dialogs.noGamesMsg:
No Anno game installations detected.

Auto-detection searched:
• Windows Registry (Ubisoft Launcher)
• Windows Registry (Steam)
• Common installation paths

If Anno is installed at a custom location,
use the Browse button to select it manually.
dialogs.selectGameDir: Please select the Anno game directory.
dialogs.gameNotExist: The specified Anno game directory does not exist.
dialogs.selectLanguage:
Please select a game language before running with GUID comments enabled.

If no languages are available, run extraction first.
dialogs.selectLanguageForComments: GUID comments is enabled — select a game language (texts_*.xml) before processing.
dialogs.noLanguagesForComments:
GUID comments is enabled, but no texts_*.xml files were found.

Run extraction first to extract game language files from the RDA archives.
dialogs.invalidOutputPath:
The output path is not valid or writable.

Please choose a different location.
dialogs.invalidAnnoDirectoryMsg:
The selected directory does not appear to be a valid Anno installation.

Expected to find 'maindata' folder containing RDA files.

Supported games:
  • Anno 1800
  • Anno 117 - Pax Romana
  • Anno 1404/2070 (partial support)
dialogs.noRDAFilesMsg:
No RDA files found in maindata folder.

Expected to find RDA archives (*.rda files).
The game installation may be incomplete or corrupted.
dialogs.rdaMsg:
The game's RDA archive files contain the latest raw XML definitions including all DLC updates and most current game definitions.

This will:
1. Locate game RDA files (data0.rda, data1.rda, etc.)
2. Extract raw XML files (assets.xml, properties.xml, templates.xml)
3. Extract all available language files (texts_*.xml for all languages)

This is a one-time process per game.

Continue?
dialogs.rdaCompleteMsg:
RDA EXTRACTION COMPLETE!

Extracted files location:
{0}

Configure processing options and click 'Process Assets'. Game language is only needed if GUID comments is enabled.
dialogs.extractionSuccessMsg:
Asset extraction completed successfully!

Do you want to open the output folder?
dialogs.autoDetectionFailed:
Could not automatically detect Anno 1800 or Anno 117 installation.

Please use the Browse button to manually select your Anno game directory.

The directory should contain a 'maindata' folder with RDA files.
dialogs.languagesDetected: Languages detected and ready for extraction!
dialogs.noLanguagesDetectedMsg:
No extracted language files found.

Please run asset extraction first to extract game languages.

Language files are extracted from the game's RDA archives during the extraction process.

issueSummary.title: Developer issue summary
issueSummary.noneRecorded: No structured issues were recorded (0 warnings, 0 errors). Names containing "Fail" in the log are asset titles, not errors.
issueSummary.counts: Recorded issues: {0} warning(s), {1} error(s). Review the groups below — no need to search the log for red lines.
issueSummary.moreInReport: … and {0} more in the JSON report

ParentAssetNotInGuidIndex.title: Parent asset not in GUID index
ParentAssetNotInGuidIndex.rootCause: Dependency resolution could not find the parent asset XML because its GUID is missing from the file index built after extraction.
ParentAssetNotInGuidIndex.hint: Parents must be indexed from the output root and the BaseAssetGUID folder before dependency resolution runs.

ParentAssetLoadFailed.title: Parent asset failed to load
ParentAssetLoadFailed.rootCause: The parent file is listed in the GUID index but could not be read or parsed as XML.
ParentAssetLoadFailed.hint: Check that the parent file is valid XML and not locked by another process.

ExtractAssetFailed.title: Asset extraction failed
ExtractAssetFailed.rootCause: Writing the extracted ModOp/XML file for this asset failed.
ExtractAssetFailed.hint: Check disk space, path length, and whether the source asset in assets.xml is valid.

MergeAssetFailed.title: Template merge failed
MergeAssetFailed.rootCause: Merging inherited template properties into this asset file failed.
MergeAssetFailed.hint: Inspect templates.xml, properties.xml, and the asset's template name.

FormatFileFailed.title: Formatting failed
FormatFileFailed.rootCause: Final formatting (cleanup, comments, or folder move) failed for this file.
FormatFileFailed.hint: Open the file path in the sample and fix malformed XML or permissions.

UnexpectedFileProcessingError.title: Unexpected formatting error
UnexpectedFileProcessingError.rootCause: An unexpected I/O or XML error occurred during the formatting pass.
UnexpectedFileProcessingError.hint: See the detail text and the full issues JSON in the logs folder.

MoveToTemplateFolderFailed.title: Template folder move failed
MoveToTemplateFolderFailed.rootCause: The asset XML could not be moved into its template-named subfolder.
MoveToTemplateFolderFailed.hint: Another process may hold the file open, or the destination path may be invalid.

ModPackageSkippedInvalidXml.title: Asset mod skipped (invalid XML)
ModPackageSkippedInvalidXml.rootCause: The asset XML could not be packaged (missing ModOp/GUID or invalid structure).
ModPackageSkippedInvalidXml.hint: Open the source XML and confirm it has a valid ModOp with a GUID.

ModPackageReadXmlFailed.title: Asset mod read failed
ModPackageReadXmlFailed.rootCause: The mod packager could not read this asset XML from disk.
ModPackageReadXmlFailed.hint: Verify the file exists and is readable XML.

RdaExtractionFailed.title: RDA extraction failed
RdaExtractionFailed.rootCause: Phase 1 could not decompress or extract required game archives.
RdaExtractionFailed.hint: Verify the game path, disk space, and that maindata RDA files are intact.

PipelineFatalError.title: Pipeline error
PipelineFatalError.rootCause: A fatal error stopped the pipeline before completion.
PipelineFatalError.hint: See the message and detail in the JSON report or console log above.
